3046980.name: Distant Realm
3046980.description:
Not Remaster, Reboot!


Distant Realm is originally an adventure game from 2006, combined with role-playing elements. Take control of a young man who has lost his memory upon crashing to a foreign world. Explore the island, clear dungeons, find loot, buy a farm and grow tomatoes. Your call.

Features:

  • Overhaul of backgrounds, while keeping the feel of the authentic look
  • New Dungeons & New Enemies!
  • Hero movement and animation is now realistic
  • Replacing arrow controls with the modern WASD scheme
  • Introduction of hotkeys to make selections easier
  • Improved HUD and all the text
  • Improved dialogue with slightly better humor
3046980.supported_languages:
土耳其语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
